courseSubtitle: Build and deploy generative AI and machine learning solutions using Genkit, BigQuery ML, and Vertex AI.
courseDescription: Learn to build intelligent applications by mastering Genkit workflows, integrating with real-world data, utilizing BigQuery for data analysis and ML, and leveraging Vertex AI for training, tuning, and deploying models. Explore prompt engineering, architecture patterns, and practical use cases on Google Cloud.

campLeaders.name: Chandan Khamitkar
bio: Varshita is a passionate web educator and developer with a mission to simplify learning has built projects, blending both design and development
Actively participated in hackathons, gaining real-world problem-solving experience through rapid prototyping and collaboration.
Currently leading this course to help beginners kickstart their journey in web development and build a solid project-ready foundation.

campLeaders.name: Revant Peethala
campLeaders.designation:
Sr. ML Developer,
The Ananta Studio™
bio: Varshita is a passionate web educator and developer with a mission to simplify learning has built projects, blending both design and development
Actively participated in hackathons, gaining real-world problem-solving experience through rapid prototyping and collaboration.
Currently leading this course to help beginners kickstart their journey in web development and build a solid project-ready foundation.

campLeaders.name: Manas Malla
bio: As the Google Product Expert for Android, Manas has over 8+ year of experience building for the Android ecosystem. He has built over 30+ applications for the Android ecosystem and has won the WWDC20, the World Ocean Science Congress Competition for his applications. 1 ,2

With over 65+ badges on the Google Developer Profile, Manas has been the Android Study Jams Facilitator in the past for Google Developer Groups Vizag, where he has taught over 350+ enthusiastic developers on how to build for Android. 5

benefits.text: This course provides practical skills in building and deploying machine learning and generative AI applications on Google Cloud Platform.

list.title: Build Gen AI Applications
list.content: Learn to create intelligent applications and workflows using Genkit.

list.title: Analyze Data with BigQuery ML
list.content: Utilize powerful data warehousing and in-database machine learning capabilities with BigQuery ML.

list.title: Master Cloud ML Platform
list.content: Gain expertise in training, tuning, and deploying models using Vertex AI.

list.title: Develop Practical Skills
list.content: Integrate AI solutions with APIs, handle data, and deploy projects to the cloud.
